abigail_johnson.primary_role: Fidelity Investments Media Relations (corporate parent; she is CEO/Chairman)
abigail_johnson.notes: Abigail Johnson's giving runs through the Fidelity Foundation and the Edward C. Johnson Fund, neither of which publishes a press contact. The Fidelity corporate media relations inbox is the most reliable channel; she is reached as Chair/CEO of Fidelity Investments.

alice_walton.primary_role: Alice L. Walton Foundation (web form only; no public email)
alice_walton.notes: Alice L. Walton Foundation explicitly says 'media and other inquiries... may be sent by email' but routes via a web form rather than publishing an address. Walton Family Foundation press contact is Daphne Moore, Communications Director (no public email; route via wff.org form). Best single fallback: communications@bloomberg.org-style is unavailable here.

charles_koch.primary_role: Stand Together / Charles Koch Foundation press team
charles_koch.notes: Stand Together is the umbrella for Charles Koch's philanthropic and political network and is the explicit press contact for the Charles Koch Foundation; CKF's contact page links to a 'Contact Media' form that routes here.

elon_musk.primary_role: Tesla Press (Musk's primary corporate press channel)
elon_musk.notes: Musk Foundation has no website beyond a single landing page and publishes no contact email. Tesla's press@tesla.com is the closest functioning channel; Tesla disbanded its US PR team in 2020 and rarely responds. SpaceX press@spacex.com is an alternate.

harold_hamm.primary_role: Dara McBee, Media Contact, Hamm Institute for American Energy (OSU)
harold_hamm.notes: Harold Hamm Foundation has no public press contact. The Hamm Institute (his major philanthropic vehicle at OSU) has a named media contact. Continental Resources is now private and IR/media is gated.

ira_rennert.primary_role: Belinda Dela Cruz, VP Business Development, The Renco Group (only published Renco email)
ira_rennert.notes: Renco Group publishes no press contact. Rennert is media-averse with no public foundation press channel. Dela Cruz is the only published Renco email; she would route press to whomever handles it. Phone +1 212-541-6000 is the Renco main line.

jeff_bezos.primary_role: Bezos Earth Fund contact form (no published press email)
jeff_bezos.notes: Bezos Earth Fund publishes no press email; only a contact form. Day One Fund has no working website. Amazon press handles Bezos as founder but not his philanthropy. Bezos's personal spokesperson is Rob Munoz / Patti Smith historically; not publicly listed.

jensen_huang.primary_role: NVIDIA Corporate Communications (Huang has no public foundation press contact)
jensen_huang.notes: Jen-Hsun & Lori Huang Foundation has no website, no staff, and is filed via Frank Rimerman & Co LLP. NVIDIA's press@nvidia.com is the only functional channel; he is approached as NVIDIA CEO.

jim_walton.primary_role: Walton Family Foundation contact form (Daphne Moore, Communications Director)
jim_walton.notes: Jim Walton has no separate foundation website. WFF Communications Director is Daphne Davis Moore; foundation publishes only a web form. Arvest Bank PR is a poor fit for personal-philanthropy press.

julia_koch.notes: Julia Koch's personal site explicitly publishes media@juliakoch.com for media requests. inquiries@juliakoch.com is the general-inquiry alternate. David H. Koch Foundation also lists info@davidhkochfoundation.org.

ken_griffin.primary_role: Griffin Catalyst (Ken Griffin's civic engagement vehicle; no published email — PR Newswire releases hide the address)
ken_griffin.notes: Griffin Catalyst routes media via PR Newswire but redacts the email in public releases. Citadel's media team (Zia Ahmed, Head of Corporate Comms) handles Griffin's press but publishes no public address. Best public approach: contact form on griffincatalyst.org.

larry_ellison.primary_role: Larry Ellison Foundation general inquiries inbox
larry_ellison.notes: Foundation explicitly lists this as the contact email for all inquiries. Note this is an Outlook.com address (unusual for a billionaire foundation). Site warns 'we may not respond to all inquiries.'

larry_page.primary_role: No public contact — Carl Victor Page Memorial Foundation has no website and explicitly does not invite contact
larry_page.notes: Page is one of the most opaque major philanthropists. CVPMF gives almost entirely via DAFs at NPT. No published spokesperson. Page-Southworth family office (Hangar One Ventures-adjacent) is private. PitchBook lists no contact.

mark_cuban.notes: Mark Cuban Foundation routes via web form. Cuban himself responds to direct email (mark@dallasmavs.com is widely cited but not for press). markcubancompanies.com publishes no press email. Cuban famously self-handles press via X DMs.

miriam_adelson.notes: Foundation publishes this single inbox for 'all inquiries.' No dedicated press email. Foundation is heavily Israel/Jewish-causes focused; political press goes via Las Vegas Sands or her PAC operations.

philip_anschutz.primary_role: The Anschutz Foundation general contact (per privacy policy footer)
philip_anschutz.notes: Anschutz is famously media-averse. The Anschutz Foundation publishes this email only in its privacy policy. Longtime spokesman Jim Monaghan handles Anschutz Corp press but no public address. Anschutz Family Foundation (separate entity) is info@anschutzfamily.org.

rob_walton.primary_role: Walton Family Foundation contact form (default for Walton family press)
rob_walton.notes: Rob Walton Foundation website publishes no contact info. WFF Communications Director Daphne Davis Moore is the family's most accessible PR conduit. Rob's personal interests (conservation, Denver Broncos) don't have a press email either.

rupert_murdoch.primary_role: Jim Kennedy, EVP & Chief Communications Officer, News Corp
rupert_murdoch.notes: Kennedy is News Corp's named Chief Communications Officer and signs press releases. He handles Murdoch family press queries. Confirmed via SEC filing.

sergey_brin.primary_role: No public press contact — Bayshore Global Management (family office) handles spokesperson role privately
sergey_brin.notes: Sergey Brin Family Foundation is administered via Pacific Foundation Services (1660 Bush St, San Francisco) and shares an address with Catalyst4. A 'Brin spokesperson' is quoted in Bloomberg/Fortune but never named, and Bayshore Global publishes no contact. Inquiries can be sent to PFS at info@pfs-llc.net but PFS administers many family foundations.

stephen_ross.notes: Related Companies' contact page explicitly lists this as the press email. Natalie Ravitz is named press contact in PR Newswire releases (+1 212-801-1000). Ross's personal foundation routes via Related Ross.

stephen_schwarzman.notes: Blackstone explicitly publishes press@blackstone.com for media inquiries on both Schwarzman's bio page and the Blackstone Charitable Foundation page. Emilie Stanton is named as a specific contact.

steve_ballmer.primary_role: Ballmer Group contact form (foundation publishes no email)
steve_ballmer.notes: Ballmer Group's site has no public press email. Foundation email format is first@ballmergroup.org per RocketReach, but no Communications Director is publicly named. Ballmer's separate USAFacts venture has its own press contacts.

steve_cohen.primary_role: Point72 press inquiries (Cohen is Chairman/CEO of Point72)
steve_cohen.notes: Point72 explicitly publishes pressinquiries@point72.com. Steven & Alexandra Cohen Foundation also has a press contact at steveandalex.org/get-connected (email obscured but published). NY Mets PR is separate.

thomas_peterffy.primary_role: Interactive Brokers Media Contact (Peterffy is Founder/Chairman)
thomas_peterffy.notes: Peterffy's Balance for Freedom foundation has no website and gave nothing in 5 of last 6 years. The Peterffy Foundation (run by his children) publishes no contact. IBKR media is the only published channel; Peterffy is reached as IBKR Chairman.
